indicators.name: dining table with books and papers
indicators.rationale: The dining table is cluttered with books and papers, indicating a non-sleep-friendly environment.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not comfortable for sleeping and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no bed or sleeping area
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other sleeping area present, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains to control light and provide privacy.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or sleeping area, and the hard flooring and cluttered table make it unsuitable for sleep. The lack of windows or curtains further contributes to the unsuitability for sleep.
